name: Vengeful Spirit
description: The road of revenge is long, but what awaits me at the end makes it worthwhile.

abilities.name: Retribution
abilities.description: Applies a unique enemy incoming damage amplification debuff on the enemy hero who kills Vengeful Spirit that lasts until its next death. The debuff amplifies all incoming damage sourced to Vengeful Spirit on the affected enemy. Applies the debuff to units who killed Shen's illusions.

abilities.name: Soul Strike
abilities.description: Attacks now fire traces of her soul that punch the enemy on contact, making Vengeful Spirit akin to a melee unit with her attacks also having melee behavior.

abilities.name: Magic Missile
abilities.description: Fires a magic missile at an enemy unit, stunning and dealing damage. Deals additional damage corresponding to the number of creeps the affected enemy has killed and denied.

abilities.name: Wave of Terror
abilities.description: Grants self a factor of the total amount of armor reduced and attack damage reduced as bonuses.

abilities.name: Vengeance Aura
abilities.description: The Vengeance Illusion is a strong illusion that deals as much damage as Vengeful Spirit. Has full health and mana upon creation. Although they may not share her undying passion for revenge, allies do draw on her fanaticism in combat.

abilities.name: Nether Swap
abilities.description: Instantaneously swaps positions with either a targeted allied unit or targeted enemy unit, and interrupts their channeling abilities. If the swapped unit is an enemy unit, the reposition deals damage to the affected enemy unit. If the swapped unit is an allied unit, the instant reposition grants both Vengeful Spirit and her allied unit a temporary shield.
